basic_details.job_title: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University (MSU) Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website msuniv.ac.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between as per official notification who have First Class M.Sc. in Biotechnology or any Life Science degree are eligible to apply for this Project Assistant vacancy. The offline application process for MSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started on 13 May 2026 and will remain open until 22 May 2026.

qualification.details: First Class M.Sc. in Biotechnology, or any Life Science degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: msuniv.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your offline application for the Project Assistant post is 22nd May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First Class M.Sc. degree in Biotechnology or any Life Science degree to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive by Manonmaniam Sundaranar University.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Assistant recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Manonmaniam Sundaranar University located?
faq.answer: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University is located in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 627012.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contract-based job for the Project Assistant position at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Manonmaniam Sundaranar University, which is msuniv.ac.in.
